title: Dreamy Creamy Kenyan Chicken Curry
description: A funky and creamy Kenyan dish perfect for a date night, featuring marjoram and nuka-pickle, with a dash-friendly twist.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the chicken and cook until browned, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the curry powder, salt, and pepper, and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the marjoram, nuka-pickle, and coconut milk, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook until the chicken is cooked through, about 15-20 minutes.
Reduce the heat to low and let the curry simmer for 5 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
Serve the curry hot, garnished with additional marjoram if desired.
Note: this recipe is for refrigerator pickling/preserving only — store in the refrigerator and consume within 1 week. Do not water-bath can without an acid (vinegar or lemon juice).
